name: leadloop
description: AI-assisted lead prioritization dashboard with a self-improving recommendation engine.

scripts.dev: concurrently -n web,api "npm run dev --workspace @leadloop/web" "npm run dev --workspace @leadloop/api"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @leadloop/shared && npm run build --workspace @leadloop/web
scripts.test: npm run test --workspace @leadloop/web && npm run test --workspace @leadloop/api
scripts.check: npm run lint && npm run build && npm run test
